title: Load Shedding & Request Prioritization
description: Implement load shedding techniques to protect systems from extreme saturation. Design request prioritization algorithms and priority queues for critical traffic. Evaluate the trade-offs of rejecting low-value traffic to maintain core service availability.
objectives: Implement load shedding techniques to protect systems from extreme saturation.
Design request prioritization algorithms and priority queues for critical traffic.
Evaluate the trade-offs of rejecting low-value traffic to maintain core service availability.
